backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing clothing item storage with upload, retrieval, and outfit pair generation based on color/pattern matching algorithms.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: photo upload interface, gallery view, outfit suggestions, and fashion-forward visual theme with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and styling with warm earth tone design system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using warm earth tones (terracotta, sage, cream, brown).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Outfit Matcher application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, upload, wardrobe, and outfits pages wrapped in Layout.
frontend/src/components/ClothingUpload.t: Comprehensive upload component with camera capture and file selection, metadata inputs (type, pattern, color), upload progress tracking, and success/error handling.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout with sticky header navigation, Internet Identity authentication controls, responsive mobile menu, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/OutfitPairCard.t: Displays a single outfit pairing card with top and bottom clothing images, pattern badges, and a color-coded match percentage score. Includes hover effects and fallback placeholder images.
frontend/src/components/OutfitSuggestion: Renders a grid of outfit pair suggestions using the useOutfitPairs hook, with loading states, error handling, empty state messaging, and a refresh button. Shows the total count of suggested outfits.
Displays the user's wardrobe items grouped by clothing type (tops, bottoms, outerwear, accessories) in a responsive grid layout. Handles loading, error, and empty states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state. Automatically invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClothingUpload.ts: Provides a mutation hook for uploading clothing items with file conversion to ExternalBlob, upload progress tracking, and automatic query invalidation on success. Includes reset functionality for the upload state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider with login, logout, and identity state management. Handles AuthClient creation, delegation validation, and provides typed status states for the authentication flow.
frontend/src/hooks/useOutfitPairs.ts: Wraps useGetOutfitPairs query with memoized sorting logic to return outfit pairs ordered by match score in descending order.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching clothing items and outfit pairs from the backend actor, both scoped to the authenticated user's principal. Queries are enabled only when actor and identity are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useWardrobe.ts: Wraps useGetClothingItems query and provides memoized grouping of clothing items by type (top, bottom, outerwear, accessory) for organized display.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm earth-tone color palette (terracotta, sage, cream, warm-brown) using OKLCH color space for both light and dark modes. Includes utility classes for custom colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component with hero section, three feature cards (Capture, Build Wardrobe, Get Outfit Ideas), and a call-to-action section linking to the upload page.
frontend/src/pages/OutfitsPage.tsx: Page displaying outfit suggestions with a header, navigation to wardrobe, and the OutfitSuggestions component.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Upload page with a hero banner image and the ClothingUpload component wrapped in a card for adding new wardrobe items.
frontend/src/pages/WardrobePage.tsx: Wardrobe gallery page displaying all clothing items with a header and button to add new items via the upload page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (terracotta, sage, cream, warm-brown), typography, animations, and design tokens using OKLCH color space.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (photo upload, gallery view, outfit suggestions, visual theme) and pending backend features (storage, AI analysis, matching algorithm).
